features.evidence: today i m going to be reviewing the idea pad 5 pro 16 for 2024 i put a poll out about which laptops you would me to review something i m going to be regularly doing anyway this one came in dead last so i thought i d completely ignore you guys but in all seriousness i really this laptop and i think it might be one of the most underrated out there so today i m going to tell you why this laptop is so special and some of the drawbacks that you must be aware of before buying one all right here s the skinny the idad 5 pro is the equival of eating at a nice hotel buffet pretty much everything is there and it is good but nothing is amazing to get amazing you d want to go to a specialist restaurant instead but when you consider what you re getting for the price you ve paid the buffet wins in value so let s translate this into laptop speak for an msrp of around 1,100 you get one of intel or amd s latest processors you get a dedicated nvidia rtx 3050 a 16 in high resolution display 16 gig of memory and 512 gig of storage and it s all packed into a quality lenovo chassis that s reasonably compact and portable plus at the time of this video you can upgrade the amd model to an rtx 4050 for just 70 i bought our model when it was released and at that time only the intel version was available so the core ultra 5 is what i have in this chassis though lenovo really makes it sing in fact this core ultra 5 in this laptop perform very well compared to many core ultra 7 laptops that we ve tested that is likely because lenovo is fitting it a a ton of power but before you go out and buy the intel version we recently tested both intel and amd s latest processors in an identical laptop a zenbook 14 the amd1 was hands down the better processor it delivered more performance and it was more power efficient which resulted in better battery life so even though this intel processor performs very well in this laptop unless your specific applications perform better on intel i d get the amd variant an example of this by the way is adobe s premier pro it still seems to perform much better with an intel cpu back to the idea pad 5 pro though just the cpu lenovo feeds its dedicated rtx 3050 a ton of power that makes this rtx 3050 perform better than some rtx 450s in laptops that don t feed the graphics that much power dell s new xps 14 i played a round of league of legends at the screen native 2560 x600 resolution with everything set to highest and i was able to comfortably max out the 120 hz refresh rate now with all this power comes great responsibility and lenovo are being responsible here the heaten fan noise is surprisingly good when the processor is under max load the keyboard deck gets warm but only to 39 c and the fan noise hits 49 db that is really good and in light use the laptop is dead silent and it only feels a tiny bit warm if you do hold the laptop up to your ear yes you will hear the fans going but when it s on a desk you can t on battery this laptop maintains its excellent max cpu performance but that means even with this laptop s large 84w hour battery you ll drain it fast if you re doing performance tasks while unplugged that being said if all you re doing is something light taking notes or watching a movie it does give you good run times but the good doesn t end there the chassis is quite wellb built with minimal screen flex and the keyboard deck feels rigid its bezels around the screen are thin making it look modern in fact the laptop itself is surprisingly thin given the hardware inside this makes it very portable for what it is the keyboard is very comfortable to type on and it has a standard layout so no issues of mis pressing keys here it does have a number pad which causes the keyboard to be off center i personally don t have issues with that but some of you might also if you to use microsoft s ai co pilot there is a dedicated button for it that s where the right control key would have normally been finally this laptop has windows hello facial recognition to get you logged in fast that is a lot of good stuff so here s the gotches that you need to know before you run out and buy one all right there are two displays available just the buffet that i mentioned earlier both are okay but neither are great my model came with a 2560 x600 ips mat panel on the surface it looks decent enough but it s not that bright at 370 nits its colors also aren t accurate enough for professional color work the other display has a lower 248x 1280 resolution spread across a large 16in panel many people who look at small text all day me we ll find that this just doesn t provide enough clarity and definition that panel though is an oled one that is brighter and has substantially better color accuracy if you re wondering which of the two that i choose it s this one the 2560 x600 panel but right now unfortunately in the usa that panel is only available with the intel processor the ports while plentiful have slow usb transfer speeds they re all 5 gbits and the sd card rer is slow too usbc charging is supported though let s talk about the speakers they do not have any base and when i say that it s the entire base has been completely deleted from the music it s a pity as the rest of the speakers are pretty good they get really loud and using lenovo s vantage software you can get a nice immersive sound stage the trackpad works very well for a laptop at this price point but the click is loud the webcam on this laptop is really bad folks colors are way off finally the memory is soldered and at the time of this review at least in the usa you could only buy it with 16 gigs so as you can see this id pad 5 pro 16 for 2024 is a great laptop for the price particularly if you re someone me who crosses use cases i program on my laptops which in my case require cpu performance i gamer my laptop which requires gpu performance i video edit and i a large screen for that and i move around a lot so i want something portable this laptop gives me a good amount of everything however if your only use case is one thing such as gaming you will do better if you buy a dedicated gaming laptop instead and we ve frequently seen laptops with much more powerful rtx 460s fall into this price range now if this id pad 5 pro goes on sale and drops below 1,000 then it becomes a must buy and if you re looking to find the cheapest price on all the laptops that we recommend check out our new website we list all our favorite laptops there for various types of use cases as well as where to go to get the best deal on them i want to end this video a little differently throughout my time using the idea pad 5 pro 16 i regularly found myself uttering the following i love this laptop and if i was shopping at around 1,000 it is the one that i would personally buy ladies and gentlemen in 200 plus laptop review videos it s pretty rare that i say that josh out

today i m going to be reviewing the idea pad 5 pro 16 for 2024 i put a poll out about which laptops you would me to review something i m going to be regularly doing anyway this one came in dead last so i thought i d completely ignore you guys but in all seriousness i really this laptop and i think it might be one of the most underrated out there so today i m going to tell you why this laptop is so special and some of the drawbacks that you must be aware of before buying one all right here s the skinny the idad 5 pro is the equival of eating at a nice hotel buffet pretty much everything is there and it is good but nothing is amazing to get amazing you d want to go to a specialist restaurant instead but when you consider what you re getting for the price you ve paid the buffet wins in value so let s translate this into laptop speak for an msrp of around 1,100 you get one of intel or amd s latest processors you get a dedicated nvidia rtx 3050 a 16 in high resolution display 16 gig of memory and 512 gig of storage and it s all packed into a quality lenovo chassis that s reasonably compact and portable plus at the time of this video you can upgrade the amd model to an rtx 4050 for just 70 i bought our model when it was released and at that time only the intel version was available so the core ultra 5 is what i have in this chassis though lenovo really makes it sing in fact this core ultra 5 in this laptop perform very well compared to many core ultra 7 laptops that we ve tested that is likely because lenovo is fitting it a a ton of power but before you go out and buy the intel version we recently tested both intel and amd s latest processors in an identical laptop a zenbook 14 the amd1 was hands down the better processor it delivered more performance and it was more power efficient which resulted in better battery life so even though this intel processor performs very well in this laptop unless your specific applications perform better on intel i d get the amd variant an example of this by the way is adobe s premier pro it still seems to perform much better with an intel cpu back to the idea pad 5 pro though just the cpu lenovo feeds its dedicated rtx 3050 a ton of power that makes this rtx 3050 perform better than some rtx 450s in laptops that don t feed the graphics that much power dell s new xps 14 i played a round of league of legends at the screen native 2560 x600 resolution with everything set to highest and i was able to comfortably max out the 120 hz refresh rate now with all this power comes great responsibility and lenovo are being responsible here the heaten fan noise is surprisingly good when the processor is under max load the keyboard deck gets warm but only to 39 c and the fan noise hits 49 db that is really good and in light use the laptop is dead silent and it only feels a tiny bit warm if you do hold the laptop up to your ear yes you will hear the fans going but when it s on a desk you can t on battery this laptop maintains its excellent max cpu performance but that means even with this laptop s large 84w hour battery you ll drain it fast if you re doing performance tasks while unplugged that being said if all you re doing is something light taking notes or watching a movie it does give you good run times but the good doesn t end there the chassis is quite wellb built with minimal screen flex and the keyboard deck feels rigid its bezels around the screen are thin making it look modern in fact the laptop itself is surprisingly thin given the hardware inside this makes it very portable for what it is the keyboard is very comfortable to type on and it has a standard layout so no issues of mis pressing keys here it does have a number pad which causes the keyboard to be off center i personally don t have issues with that but some of you might also if you to use microsoft s ai co pilot there is a dedicated button for it that s where the right control key would have normally been finally this laptop has windows hello facial recognition to get you logged in fast that is a lot of good stuff so here s the gotches that you need to know before you run out and buy one all right there are two displays available just the buffet that i mentioned earlier both are okay but neither are great my model came with a 2560 x600 ips mat panel on the surface it looks decent enough but it s not that bright at 370 nits its colors also aren t accurate enough for professional color work the other display has a lower 248x 1280 resolution spread across a large 16in panel many people who look at small text all day me we ll find that this just doesn t provide enough clarity and definition that panel though is an oled one that is brighter and has substantially better color accuracy if you re wondering which of the two that i choose it s this one the 2560 x600 panel but right now unfortunately in the usa that panel is only available with the intel processor the ports while plentiful have slow usb transfer speeds they re all 5 gbits and the sd card rer is slow too usbc charging is supported though let s talk about the speakers they do not have any base and when i say that it s the entire base has been completely deleted from the music it s a pity as the rest of the speakers are pretty good they get really loud and using lenovo s vantage software you can get a nice immersive sound stage the trackpad works very well for a laptop at this price point but the click is loud the webcam on this laptop is really bad folks colors are way off finally the memory is soldered and at the time of this review at least in the usa you could only buy it with 16 gigs so as you can see this id pad 5 pro 16 for 2024 is a great laptop for the price particularly if you re someone me who crosses use cases i program on my laptops which in my case require cpu performance i gamer my laptop which requires gpu performance i video edit and i a large screen for that and i move around a lot so i want something portable this laptop gives me a good amount of everything however if your only use case is one thing such as gaming you will do better if you buy a dedicated gaming laptop instead and we ve frequently seen laptops with much more powerful rtx 460s fall into this price range now if this id pad 5 pro goes on sale and drops below 1,000 then it becomes a must buy and if you re looking to find the cheapest price on all the laptops that we recommend check out our new website we list all our favorite laptops there for various types of use cases as well as where to go to get the best deal on them i want to end this video a little differently throughout my time using the idea pad 5 pro 16 i regularly found myself uttering the following i love this laptop and if i was shopping at around 1,000 it is the one that i would personally buy ladies and gentlemen in 200 plus laptop review videos it s pretty rare that i say that josh out However, now, don t get me wrong, this thing can edit videos, but you ll need to manage your expectations
now, from a design standpoint, this thing is drop deadad gorgeous

today i m going to be reviewing the idea pad 5 pro 16 for 2024 i put a poll out about which laptops you would me to review something i m going to be regularly doing anyway this one came in dead last so i thought i d completely ignore you guys but in all seriousness i really this laptop and i think it might be one of the most underrated out there so today i m going to tell you why this laptop is so special and some of the drawbacks that you must be aware of before buying one all right here s the skinny the idad 5 pro is the equival of eating at a nice hotel buffet pretty much everything is there and it is good but nothing is amazing to get amazing you d want to go to a specialist restaurant instead but when you consider what you re getting for the price you ve paid the buffet wins in value so let s translate this into laptop speak for an msrp of around 1,100 you get one of intel or amd s latest processors you get a dedicated nvidia rtx 3050 a 16 in high resolution display 16 gig of memory and 512 gig of storage and it s all packed into a quality lenovo chassis that s reasonably compact and portable plus at the time of this video you can upgrade the amd model to an rtx 4050 for just 70 i bought our model when it was released and at that time only the intel version was available so the core ultra 5 is what i have in this chassis though lenovo really makes it sing in fact this core ultra 5 in this laptop perform very well compared to many core ultra 7 laptops that we ve tested that is likely because lenovo is fitting it a a ton of power but before you go out and buy the intel version we recently tested both intel and amd s latest processors in an identical laptop a zenbook 14 the amd1 was hands down the better processor it delivered more performance and it was more power efficient which resulted in better battery life so even though this intel processor performs very well in this laptop unless your specific applications perform better on intel i d get the amd variant an example of this by the way is adobe s premier pro it still seems to perform much better with an intel cpu back to the idea pad 5 pro though just the cpu lenovo feeds its dedicated rtx 3050 a ton of power that makes this rtx 3050 perform better than some rtx 450s in laptops that don t feed the graphics that much power dell s new xps 14 i played a round of league of legends at the screen native 2560 x600 resolution with everything set to highest and i was able to comfortably max out the 120 hz refresh rate now with all this power comes great responsibility and lenovo are being responsible here the heaten fan noise is surprisingly good when the processor is under max load the keyboard deck gets warm but only to 39 c and the fan noise hits 49 db that is really good and in light use the laptop is dead silent and it only feels a tiny bit warm if you do hold the laptop up to your ear yes you will hear the fans going but when it s on a desk you can t on battery this laptop maintains its excellent max cpu performance but that means even with this laptop s large 84w hour battery you ll drain it fast if you re doing performance tasks while unplugged that being said if all you re doing is something light taking notes or watching a movie it does give you good run times but the good doesn t end there the chassis is quite wellb built with minimal screen flex and the keyboard deck feels rigid its bezels around the screen are thin making it look modern in fact the laptop itself is surprisingly thin given the hardware inside this makes it very portable for what it is the keyboard is very comfortable to type on and it has a standard layout so no issues of mis pressing keys here it does have a number pad which causes the keyboard to be off center i personally don t have issues with that but some of you might also if you to use microsoft s ai co pilot there is a dedicated button for it that s where the right control key would have normally been finally this laptop has windows hello facial recognition to get you logged in fast that is a lot of good stuff so here s the gotches that you need to know before you run out and buy one all right there are two displays available just the buffet that i mentioned earlier both are okay but neither are great my model came with a 2560 x600 ips mat panel on the surface it looks decent enough but it s not that bright at 370 nits its colors also aren t accurate enough for professional color work the other display has a lower 248x 1280 resolution spread across a large 16in panel many people who look at small text all day me we ll find that this just doesn t provide enough clarity and definition that panel though is an oled one that is brighter and has substantially better color accuracy if you re wondering which of the two that i choose it s this one the 2560 x600 panel but right now unfortunately in the usa that panel is only available with the intel processor the ports while plentiful have slow usb transfer speeds they re all 5 gbits and the sd card rer is slow too usbc charging is supported though let s talk about the speakers they do not have any base and when i say that it s the entire base has been completely deleted from the music it s a pity as the rest of the speakers are pretty good they get really loud and using lenovo s vantage software you can get a nice immersive sound stage the trackpad works very well for a laptop at this price point but the click is loud the webcam on this laptop is really bad folks colors are way off finally the memory is soldered and at the time of this review at least in the usa you could only buy it with 16 gigs so as you can see this id pad 5 pro 16 for 2024 is a great laptop for the price particularly if you re someone me who crosses use cases i program on my laptops which in my case require cpu performance i gamer my laptop which requires gpu performance i video edit and i a large screen for that and i move around a lot so i want something portable this laptop gives me a good amount of everything however if your only use case is one thing such as gaming you will do better if you buy a dedicated gaming laptop instead and we ve frequently seen laptops with much more powerful rtx 460s fall into this price range now if this id pad 5 pro goes on sale and drops below 1,000 then it becomes a must buy and if you re looking to find the cheapest price on all the laptops that we recommend check out our new website we list all our favorite laptops there for various types of use cases as well as where to go to get the best deal on them i want to end this video a little differently throughout my time using the idea pad 5 pro 16 i regularly found myself uttering the following i love this laptop and if i was shopping at around 1,000 it is the one that i would personally buy ladies and gentlemen in 200 plus laptop review videos it s pretty rare that i say that josh out However, it doesn t have quite as much resolution and the exposure or the refresh rate is not quite as good

so i thought i d completely ignore you guys but in all seriousness i really this laptop and i think it might be one of the most underrated out there so today i m going to tell you why this laptop is so special and some of the drawbacks that you must be aware of before buying one all right here s the skinny the idad 5 pro is the equival of eating at a nice hotel buffet pretty much everything is there and it is good but nothing is amazing to get amazing you d want to go to a specialist restaurant instead but when you consider what you re getting for the price you ve paid the buffet wins in value so let s translate this into laptop speak for an msrp of around 1,100 you get one of intel or amd s latest processors you get a dedicated nvidia rtx 3050 a 16 in high resolution display 16 gig of memory and 512 gig of storage and it s all packed into a quality lenovo chassis that s reasonably compact and portable plus at the time of this video you can upgrade the amd model to an rtx 4050 for just 70 i bought our model when it was released and at that time only the intel version was available so the core ultra 5 is what i have in this chassis though lenovo really makes it sing in fact this core ultra 5 in this laptop perform very well compared to many core ultra 7 laptops that we ve tested that is likely because lenovo is fitting it a a ton of power but before you go out and buy the intel version we recently tested both intel and amd s latest processors in an identical laptop a zenbook 14 the amd1 was hands down the better processor it delivered more performance and it was more power efficient which resulted in better battery life so even though this intel processor performs very well in this laptop unless your specific applications perform better on intel i d get the amd variant an example of this by the way is adobe s premier pro it still seems to perform much better with an intel cpu back to the idea pad 5 pro though just the cpu lenovo feeds its dedicated rtx 3050 a ton of power that makes this rtx 3050 perform better than some rtx 450s in laptops that don t feed the graphics that much power dell s new xps 14 i played a round of league of legends at the screen native 2560 x600 resolution with everything set to highest and i was able to comfortably max out the 120 hz refresh rate now with all this power comes great responsibility and lenovo are being responsible here the heaten fan noise is surprisingly good when the processor is under max load the keyboard deck gets warm but only to 39 c and the fan noise hits 49 db that is really good and in light use the laptop is dead silent and it only feels a tiny bit warm if you do hold the laptop up to your ear yes you will hear the fans going but when it s on a desk you can t on battery this laptop maintains its excellent max cpu performance but that means even with this laptop s large 84w hour battery you ll drain it fast if you re doing performance tasks while unplugged that being said if all you re doing is something light taking notes or watching a movie it does give you good run times but the good doesn t end there the chassis is quite wellb built with minimal screen flex and the keyboard deck feels rigid its bezels around the screen are thin making it look modern in fact the laptop itself is surprisingly thin given the hardware inside this makes it very portable for what it is the keyboard is very comfortable to type on and it has a standard layout so no issues of mis pressing keys here it does have a number pad which causes the keyboard to be off center i personally don t have issues with that but some of you might also if you to use microsoft s ai co pilot there is a dedicated button for it that s where the right control key would have normally been finally this laptop has windows hello facial recognition to get you logged in fast that is a lot of good stuff so here s the gotches that you need to know before you run out and buy one all right there are two displays available just the buffet that i mentioned earlier both are okay but neither are great my model came with a 2560 x600 ips mat panel on the surface it looks decent enough but it s not that bright at 370 nits its colors also aren t accurate enough for professional color work the other display has a lower 248x 1280 resolution spread across a large 16in panel many people who look at small text all day me we ll find that this just doesn t provide enough clarity and definition that panel though is an oled one that is brighter and has substantially better color accuracy if you re wondering which of the two that i choose it s this one the 2560 x600 panel but right now unfortunately in the usa that panel is only available with the intel processor the ports while plentiful have slow usb transfer speeds they re all 5 gbits and the sd card rer is slow too usbc charging is supported though let s talk about the speakers they do not have any base and when i say that it s the entire base has been completely deleted from the music it s a pity as the rest of the speakers are pretty good they get really loud and using lenovo s vantage software you can get a nice immersive sound stage the trackpad works very well for a laptop at this price point but the click is loud the webcam on this laptop is really bad folks colors are way off finally the memory is soldered and at the time of this review at least in the usa you could only buy it with 16 gigs so as you can see this id pad 5 pro 16 for 2024 is a great laptop for the price particularly if you re someone me who crosses use cases i program on my laptops which in my case require cpu performance i gamer my laptop which requires gpu performance i video edit and i a large screen for that and i move around a lot so i want something portable this laptop gives me a good amount of everything however if your only use case is one thing such as gaming you will do better if you buy a dedicated gaming laptop instead and we ve frequently seen laptops with much more powerful rtx 460s fall into this price range now if this id pad 5 pro goes on sale and drops below 1,000 then it becomes a must buy and if you re looking to find the cheapest price on all the laptops that we recommend check out our new website we list all our favorite laptops there for various types of use cases as well as where to go to get the best deal on them i want to end this video a little differently throughout my time using the idea pad 5 pro 16 i regularly found myself uttering the following i love this laptop and if i was shopping at around 1,000 it is the one that i would personally buy ladies and gentlemen in 200 plus laptop review videos it s pretty rare that i say that josh out However, and let me tell you, this amd processor absolutely crushes it in a very few unique ways

the intel version we recently tested both intel and amd s latest processors in an identical laptop a zenbook 14 the amd1 was hands down the better processor it delivered more performance and it was more power efficient which resulted in better battery life so even though this intel processor performs very well in this laptop unless your specific applications perform better on intel i d get the amd variant an example of this by the way is adobe s premier pro it still seems to perform much better with an intel cpu back to the idea pad 5 pro though just the cpu lenovo feeds its dedicated rtx 3050 a ton of power that makes this rtx 3050 perform better than some rtx 450s in laptops that don t feed the graphics that much power dell s new xps 14 i played a round of league of legends at the screen native 2560 x600 resolution with everything set to highest and i was able to comfortably max out the 120 hz refresh rate now with all this power comes great responsibility and lenovo are being responsible here the heaten fan noise is surprisingly good when the processor is under max load the keyboard deck gets warm but only to 39 c and the fan noise hits 49 db that is really good and in light use the laptop is dead silent and it only feels a tiny bit warm if you do hold the laptop up to your ear yes you will hear the fans going but when it s on a desk you can t on battery this laptop maintains its excellent max cpu performance but that means even with this laptop s large 84w hour battery you ll drain it fast if you re doing performance tasks while unplugged that being said if all you re doing is something light taking notes or watching a movie it does give you good run times but the good doesn t end there the chassis is quite wellb built with minimal screen flex and the keyboard deck feels rigid its bezels around the screen are thin making it look modern in fact the laptop itself is surprisingly thin given the hardware inside this makes it very portable for what it is the keyboard is very comfortable to type on and it has a standard layout so no issues of mis pressing keys here it does have a number pad which causes the keyboard to be off center i personally don t have issues with that but some of you might also if you to use microsoft s ai co pilot there is a dedicated button for it that s where the right control key would have normally been finally this laptop has windows hello facial recognition to get you logged in fast that is a lot of good stuff so here s the gotches that you need to know before you run out and buy one all right there are two displays available just the buffet that i mentioned earlier both are okay but neither are great my model came with a 2560 x600 ips mat panel on the surface it looks decent enough but it s not that bright at 370 nits its colors also aren t accurate enough for professional color work the other display has a lower 248x 1280 resolution spread across a large 16in panel many people who look at small text all day me we ll find that this just doesn t provide enough clarity and definition that panel though is an oled one that is brighter and has substantially better color accuracy if you re wondering which of the two that i choose it s this one the 2560 x600 panel but right now unfortunately in the usa that panel is only available with the intel processor the ports while plentiful have slow usb transfer speeds they re all 5 gbits and the sd card rer is slow too usbc charging is supported though let s talk about the speakers they do not have any base and when i say that it s the entire base has been completely deleted from the music it s a pity as the rest of the speakers are pretty good they get really loud and using lenovo s vantage software you can get a nice immersive sound stage the trackpad works very well for a laptop at this price point but the click is loud the webcam on this laptop is really bad folks colors are way off finally the memory is soldered and at the time of this review at least in the usa you could only buy it with 16 gigs so as you can see this id pad 5 pro 16 for 2024 is a great laptop for the price particularly if you re someone me who crosses use cases i program on my laptops which in my case require cpu performance i gamer my laptop which requires gpu performance i video edit and i a large screen for that and i move around a lot so i want something portable this laptop gives me a good amount of everything however if your only use case is one thing such as gaming you will do better if you buy a dedicated gaming laptop instead and we ve frequently seen laptops with much more powerful rtx 460s fall into this price range now if this id pad 5 pro goes on sale and drops below 1,000 then it becomes a must buy and if you re looking to find the cheapest price on all the laptops that we recommend check out our new website we list all our favorite laptops there for various types of use cases as well as where to go to get the best deal on them i want to end this video a little differently throughout my time using the idea pad 5 pro 16 i regularly found myself uttering the following i love this laptop and if i was shopping at around 1,000 it is the one that i would personally buy ladies and gentlemen in 200 plus laptop review videos it s pretty rare that i say that josh out However, but this is quieter as a result because it s lower watts

today i m going to be reviewing the idea pad 5 pro 16 for 2024 i put a poll out about which laptops you would me to review something i m going to be regularly doing anyway this one came in dead last so i thought i d completely ignore you guys but in all seriousness i really this laptop and i think it might be one of the most underrated out there so today i m going to tell you why this laptop is so special and some of the drawbacks that you must be aware of before buying one all right here s the skinny the idad 5 pro is the equival of eating at a nice hotel buffet pretty much everything is there and it is good but nothing is amazing to get amazing you d want to go to a specialist restaurant instead but when you consider what you re getting for the price you ve paid the buffet wins in value so let s translate this into laptop speak for an msrp of around 1,100 you get one of intel or amd s latest processors you get a dedicated nvidia rtx 3050 a 16 in high resolution display 16 gig of memory and 512 gig of storage and it s all packed into a quality lenovo chassis that s reasonably compact and portable plus at the time of this video you can upgrade the amd model to an rtx 4050 for just 70 i bought our model when it was released and at that time only the intel version was available so the core ultra 5 is what i have in this chassis though lenovo really makes it sing in fact this core ultra 5 in this laptop perform very well compared to many core ultra 7 laptops that we ve tested that is likely because lenovo is fitting it a a ton of power but before you go out and buy the intel version we recently tested both intel and amd s latest processors in an identical laptop a zenbook 14 the amd1 was hands down the better processor it delivered more performance and it was more power efficient which resulted in better battery life so even though this intel processor performs very well in this laptop unless your specific applications perform better on intel i d get the amd variant an example of this by the way is adobe s premier pro it still seems to perform much better with an intel cpu back to the idea pad 5 pro though just the cpu lenovo feeds its dedicated rtx 3050 a ton of power that makes this rtx 3050 perform better than some rtx 450s in laptops that don t feed the graphics that much power dell s new xps 14 i played a round of league of legends at the screen native 2560 x600 resolution with everything set to highest and i was able to comfortably max out the 120 hz refresh rate now with all this power comes great responsibility and lenovo are being responsible here the heaten fan noise is surprisingly good when the processor is under max load the keyboard deck gets warm but only to 39 c and the fan noise hits 49 db that is really good and in light use the laptop is dead silent and it only feels a tiny bit warm if you do hold the laptop up to your ear yes you will hear the fans going but when it s on a desk you can t on battery this laptop maintains its excellent max cpu performance but that means even with this laptop s large 84w hour battery you ll drain it fast if you re doing performance tasks while unplugged that being said if all you re doing is something light taking notes or watching a movie it does give you good run times but the good doesn t end there the chassis is quite wellb built with minimal screen flex and the keyboard deck feels rigid its bezels around the screen are thin making it look modern in fact the laptop itself is surprisingly thin given the hardware inside this makes it very portable for what it is the keyboard is very comfortable to type on and it has a standard layout so no issues of mis pressing keys here it does have a number pad which causes the keyboard to be off center i personally don t have issues with that but some of you might also if you to use microsoft s ai co pilot there is a dedicated button for it that s where the right control key would have normally been finally this laptop has windows hello facial recognition to get you logged in fast that is a lot of good stuff so here s the gotches that you need to know before you run out and buy one all right there are two displays available just the buffet that i mentioned earlier both are okay but neither are great my model came with a 2560 x600 ips mat panel on the surface it looks decent enough but it s not that bright at 370 nits its colors also aren t accurate enough for professional color work the other display has a lower 248x 1280 resolution spread across a large 16in panel many people who look at small text all day me we ll find that this just doesn t provide enough clarity and definition that panel though is an oled one that is brighter and has substantially better color accuracy if you re wondering which of the two that i choose it s this one the 2560 x600 panel but right now unfortunately in the usa that panel is only available with the intel processor the ports while plentiful have slow usb transfer speeds they re all 5 gbits and the sd card rer is slow too usbc charging is supported though let s talk about the speakers they do not have any base and when i say that it s the entire base has been completely deleted from the music it s a pity as the rest of the speakers are pretty good they get really loud and using lenovo s vantage software you can get a nice immersive sound stage the trackpad works very well for a laptop at this price point but the click is loud the webcam on this laptop is really bad folks colors are way off finally the memory is soldered and at the time of this review at least in the usa you could only buy it with 16 gigs so as you can see this id pad 5 pro 16 for 2024 is a great laptop for the price particularly if you re someone me who crosses use cases i program on my laptops which in my case require cpu performance i gamer my laptop which requires gpu performance i video edit and i a large screen for that and i move around a lot so i want something portable this laptop gives me a good amount of everything however if your only use case is one thing such as gaming you will do better if you buy a dedicated gaming laptop instead and we ve frequently seen laptops with much more powerful rtx 460s fall into this price range now if this id pad 5 pro goes on sale and drops below 1,000 then it becomes a must buy and if you re least in the usa you could only buy it with 16 gigs so as you can see this id pad 5 pro 16 for 2024 is a great laptop for the price particularly if you re someone me who crosses use cases i program on
